alkylation reagent: alkylation was done using 15 mM of iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation was done using 15 mM of iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Digestion to peptides was performed using trypsin
collision energy: fragmenting it at a collision energy (NCE) of 35
enrichment method: using an anti-Kmal antibody to enrich Kmal peptides
fragmentation method: The HCD collision energy was set to 25% Normalized Collision Energy
instrument: using a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduction was done with 5 mM DTT
reduction concentration: reduction was done with 5 mM DTT
